description_long: This object is a sleek, modern jet airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage, designed for high-speed flight. The wings are sharply swept back in a delta configuration, giving it a distinctive triangular silhouette from above. Twin engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, with visible exhaust nozzles extending past the tail section. The tail features twin vertical stabilizers and a low horizontal stabilizer, contributing to its agile appearance. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a smooth canopy blending into the body. The exterior is finished in dark tones, with subtle blue highlights on the wings and tail surfaces.
description: A modern, dark-colored jet airplane with a pointed nose, swept delta wings, twin rear engines, and twin vertical stabilizers. The cockpit is forward-mounted and smoothly integrated into the fuselage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply pointed nose, delta wing shape, and twin rear engines with visible exhausts.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin engine exhausts, twin vertical stabilizers, and the broad delta wing span.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the pointed nose, delta wings, and rear engine configuration.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the forward cockpit, wide delta wings, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-mounted, sharply swept delta wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a low horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, tricycle configuration implied by typical jet design, but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy integrated into the fuselage.
